issues.message: Marigold <TextField> onChange passes the value directly ((value: C) => void), not a DOM event.
issues.suggestion: Use onChange={(value) => ...} instead of onChange={(e) => ... e.target.value}.

issues.message: Prop "onPress" does not exist on <Badge>.
issues.suggestion: Remove the prop. Available props: children, variant, size.

issues.message: Prop "isOpen" does not exist on <Dialog>.
issues.suggestion: Replace "isOpen" with "open".

issues.message: Prop "title" does not exist on <Dialog>.
issues.suggestion: Remove the prop. Available props: variant, size, closeButton, children, id, dir, lang, hidden, inert, translate, onClick, onClickCapture, onAuxClick, onAuxClickCapture, onContextMenu, ….

issues.message: Prop "width" does not exist on <Button>.
issues.suggestion: Remove the prop. Available props: variant, size, fullWidth, children, disabled, loading, render, id, dir, lang, hidden, inert, translate, onClick, onClickCapture, ….

issues.message: <Select> is used without any of its sub-components.

issues.suggestion: Use compound children: <Dialog.Title>, <Dialog.Content>, <Dialog.Actions>.

issues.message: <Dialog> has no accessible name. A closed overlay is invisible to runtime a11y checks, so it must be labeled in the source.
issues.suggestion: Add a <Dialog.Title> child or an aria-label prop, e.g. <Dialog aria-label="…"> or <Dialog.Title>…</Dialog.Title>.
